strict_confidence_threshold.name: strict_confidence_threshold
strict_confidence_threshold.label: Confidence Threshold
strict_confidence_threshold.help: Fields below this confidence (0.0-1.0) will be scrubbed to null with explanation. Leave empty for all fields.
